chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1402 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 16-09-2025 Mr. Riaz Hussain Solangi, Advocate along with both petitioners. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, DPG along with Inspector/I.O Niaz Hussain of P.S, Bhiria Road. **** Mr. Zahid Ali Chandio, Advocate files Vakalatnama so also statement along with certain documents on behalf of respondent No.5, taken on record. I.O is present and submits that he has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 in terms of section 161 CrPC. who in her statement has not supported the contents of FIR. He further submits that after going through the statement, he is of the opinion that the case is to be disposed of under C-class. After such a statement, counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of along with pending application(s) with directions to I.O to submit such report, as suggested by him, before the concerned Magistrate within seven days. Meanwhile, official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
